name: idx_sa2_scores_sa2
sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_sa2_scores_sa2 on sa2_scores(sa2_main)

name: idx_score_income_sa2
sql:
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_score_income_sa2
            on score_income_analysis(sa2_main)

name: poi
sql:
CREATE TABLE poi (
            poi_id integer primary key autoincrement,
            objectid integer,
            poiname text,
            poitype text,
            poigroup integer,
            longitude real,
            latitude real,
            area_name text,
            sa4_code text,
            sa4_name text,
            sa2_main text,
            sa2_name text,
            foreign key (sa2_main) references sa2_bbox(sa2_main)
        )

name: poi_rtree
sql:
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE poi_rtree using rtree(
            poi_id,
            min_longitude,
            max_longitude,
            min_latitude,
            max_latitude
        )

name: sa2_bbox
sql:
CREATE TABLE sa2_bbox (
            area_name text,
            sa4_code text,
            sa4_name text,
            sa2_main text primary key,
            sa2_name text,
            state_name text,
            area_sqkm real,
            bbox_xmin real,
            bbox_ymin real,
            bbox_xmax real,
            bbox_ymax real
        )

name: sa2_income
sql:
CREATE TABLE sa2_income (
            sa2_main text primary key,
            sa2_name text,
            sa4_code text,
            sa4_name text,
            median_total_income_2022 integer
        )

name: sa2_scores
sql:
CREATE TABLE sa2_scores (
            area_name text,
            sa4_code text,
            sa4_name text,
            sa2_main text primary key,
            sa2_name text,
            area_sqkm real,
            poi_count integer,
            z_poi real,
            score real
        )

name: score_income_analysis
sql:
CREATE TABLE score_income_analysis (
            area_name text,
            sa4_code text,
            sa4_name text,
            sa2_main text primary key,
            sa2_name text,
            area_sqkm real,
            poi_count integer,
            z_poi real,
            score real,
            median_total_income_2022 integer
        )

name: score_income_correlation
sql:
CREATE TABLE score_income_correlation (
            correlation_id text primary key,
            n integer,
            pearson_r real
        )
